sources: APA Guidelines — Telepsychology and Digital Mental Health (2021)
Crisis Text Line — Design Principles for Crisis Support (2022)
research.notes: Mental wellness users are often in vulnerable emotional states. The interface must be calming, non-judgmental, and explicitly privacy-protective. Crisis resources must be prominently available. Progress tracking should focus on wellbeing trends, not gamified achievements. Formality is low to create a safe, approachable space. AAA accessibility is essential for users with cognitive differences or disabilities. Trust is paramount — any dark patterns, urgency tactics, or privacy violations can cause serious harm to vulnerable users.
